name: Mexican Dump Cornbread by Clem Kohl
recipeInstructions:
1. Dump all ingredients into a large mixing bowl.
2. Add just enough milk (while stirring with a fork) to produce a cake-like batter consistency.
3. Continue mixing with a fork until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into a well greased cookie sheet (about 14 1/2" x 10" x 1/2").
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375-400 degrees until done, approximately 20 minutes.
6. Serve hot with chunks of real butter on top.
